arts.ttl: Real Madrid close deal for young defender
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have this week secured reinforcements to the club’s defensive ranks for years to come. This comes amid confirmation that Los Blancos have closed a deal…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to Get Golden FIFA Badge For Intercontinental Cup Victory?
arts.sum: Real Madrid’s recent triumph in the inaugural FIFA Intercontinental Cup has fans and experts alike wondering: does the victory earn them the coveted FIFA Club World Cup winners’ badge? Big thanks to kit expert and designer @hendocfc for the heads-up.
